purpose: vLLM minor-version compatibility and checked Rust greedy bridge gate

vllm_matrix.dependency_note: Torch and non-vLLM dependencies were reused from the existing CUDA environment; the vLLM package and compiled extension came from the official 0.25.1 wheel.

commands: CUDA_HOME=/usr/local/cuda-13.1 LOOM_CUDA_ARCHS=90 cargo clippy -p loom-cuda-bridge --features cuda --all-targets -- -D warnings
CUDA_HOME=/usr/local/cuda-13.1 LOOM_CUDA_ARCHS=90 cargo test -p loom-cuda-bridge --features cuda --release
CUDA_HOME=/usr/local/cuda-13.1 LOOM_CUDA_ARCHS=90 cargo test -p loom-cuda --features cuda --release

bridge_contract.contiguous_logits: checked loom-cuda-bridge path; launch telemetry equals one
bridge_contract.padded_row_stride: existing raw CUDA ABI fallback; Rust bridge launch telemetry remains zero

decision.claim: The current Loom adapters and GPU test suite are compatible with the official vLLM 0.24.0 and 0.25.1 packages on the qualified H20 stack.
not_claimed: a new vLLM 0.25.1 model-level latency or throughput result
a portable Loom PyTorch binary wheel
